seed_instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances.
org_constraint: Maintain an enthusiastic and adventurous tone throughout the response.
new_constraint: Write the response in a completely neutral and emotionless manner.
instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. Maintain an enthusiastic and adventurous tone throughout the response. Write the response in a completely neutral and emotionless manner.
response:
The following is a seven-day road trip itinerary covering the US West Coast, including locations, activities, and driving distances.

Day 1: San Francisco to Yosemite Valley
Depart from San Francisco. Drive south on Highway 101 for approximately 240 miles (386 km). Arrive in Yosemite Valley by late afternoon. Activities include checking into accommodation, walking around Yosemite Valley Floor, and viewing El Capitan and Half Dome. No overnight driving.

Day 2: Yosemite Valley to Lake Tahoe
Depart early morning. Drive northeast via Highway 120 for approximately 90 miles (145 km). Arrive at South Lake Tahoe by midday. Afternoon activities involve hiking along the Lake Tahoe Blvd trail and visiting Emerald Bay State Park. Overnight stay near the lake.

Day 3: Lake Tahoe to Redwood National and State Parks
Depart after breakfast. Travel north on Highway 299 and merge onto Highway 101 for approximately 220 miles (354 km). Arrive in Crescent City or Jedediah Smith Wilderness area by evening. Evening activity includes exploring Avenue of the Giants or visiting the visitor center in Redwood National Park.

Day 4: Redwood National Park to Oregon Coast
Drive east briefly to see tall trees if time permits, then head north on Highway 101 toward Cannon Beach. Distance is approximately 85 miles (137 km) to Cannon Beach. Alternatively, drive further north to Astoria (approx. 180 miles/290 km total). This itinerary assumes travel to Florence/Cannon Beach region for an 85-mile leg. Activities: coastal hiking and tide pooling at Haystack Rock. Overnight in Cannon Beach.

Day 5: Oregon Coast to Pacific City and Tillamook
Short drive north on Highway 101 for approximately 25 miles (40 km) to Pacific City and onward to Tillamook Cheese Factory area (~10 miles more). Total drive ~35 miles. Activities include visiting Tillamook Cheese Factory, hiking Oswald West State Park, and touring Nye State Scenic Railroad. Overnight near Tillamook.

Day 6: Tillamook to Portland
Continue north on Interstate 5 for approximately 85 miles (137 km). Arrive in Portland, Oregon. Afternoon activities include visiting Powell's City of Books, walking the Pearl District, or touring the Washington Park Arboretum. Overnight in Portland.

Day 7: Portland to Seattle (or End of Trip)
Option A: Continue north on I-5 to Seattle for approx. 175 miles (282 km). Activities: Space Needle, Pike Place Market, Chihuly Garden and Glass.
Option B: Conclude trip in Portland with local exploration.
Estimated drive time and distance depend on final destination selection. Standard route to Seattle remains the primary option for completing the coast traversal.<|im_end|>
